title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament impacts their national ranking and tournament prospects.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win strengthens Virginia's position in the ACC Tournament and boosts team morale.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a crucial step for both teams in their quest for the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack face the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in an ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: The outcome of this game will significantly impact each team's tournament journey.

title: Fatal House Fire in Chesterfield County Under Investigation
summary: A house fire in Chesterfield County resulted in one fatality, prompting an arson investigation by state authorities.
charlotte_impact: The investigation will determine the cause of the fire and potential safety improvements.

title: Missing Anson County Teen Found Safe
summary: A 19-year-old missing from Anson County since March 10 has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: The safe return of the missing teen brings relief to the community and family.

title: Charlotte Airport Operational Despite TSA Staffing Issues
summary: Charlotte Douglas Airport remains operational despite nationwide TSA pay issues, urging travelers to stay vigilant.
charlotte_impact: Ensuring airport operations during staffing challenges is crucial for travel and commerce.

title: Hickory Shooting Leaves One Dead, Two Injured; Suspect Arrested
summary: A shooting in Hickory resulted in one death and two injuries. A suspect is charged with murder and attempted murder.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in the region.

title: Spring-like Weather Expected Before Storms Arrive
summary: Temperatures will reach the 70s this weekend before a cool down brings a risk of storms early next week.
charlotte_impact: Residents should prepare for changing weather conditions and potential storm hazards.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza; Police Seek Fleeing Driver
summary: A hit-and-run in Charlotte resulted in the death of a 23-year-old woman and injuries to two others. Police are seeking the driver.
charlotte_impact: The community is urged to assist in identifying the driver to bring justice to the victim.

title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after a crash in the 3900 block of South Tryon Street.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about pedestrian safety in the area.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn Sparks Safety Concerns
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident in a year. Residents are calling for the hotel to close.
charlotte_impact: The community is demanding action to address the ongoing violence and safety issues.

title: North Carolina Faces Growing Wildfire Threat
summary: Fire leaders warn that rising fire numbers and damage from Hurricane Helene are creating new challenges for crews across the state.
charlotte_impact: Increased wildfire risk requires enhanced prevention and response measures.

title: Sustain Charlotte Challenges I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge for I-77 South alternatives, as the project impacts greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Community involvement is crucial in shaping infrastructure projects and minimizing environmental impact.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic light is planned in the Catawba Ridge High School area to address safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Improved traffic safety measures are essential for protecting students and pedestrians.
